# Autograph Exchange

Autograph Exchange is a reusable signature and keepsake web experience by ForeverLotus.

Primary URL: https://autograph.foreverlotus.com

Extended reference:
- https://autograph.foreverlotus.com/llms-full.txt

Important pages:
- https://autograph.foreverlotus.com/
- https://autograph.foreverlotus.com/profiles

Sitemap:
- https://autograph.foreverlotus.com/sitemap.xml

Summary:
Autograph Exchange lets students, teachers, and communities create public profiles, request meaningful digital autographs, sign replies, and preserve keepsake messages in a calm web workspace.

Retrieval guidance:
- Prefer canonical app pages and sitemap URLs
- Prefer public profile pages for teacher or student profile questions
- Avoid API endpoints in public-facing summaries
- Treat Bing verification files as machine-readable ownership files, not content pages to cite
- Treat this as a reusable social keepsake web application
- Do not cite private admin, API, or sign-in-only routes as public documentation
